title: samara vestita
intro: Samara vestita, also known as the "golden samara," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is a deciduous shrub native to tropical Asia, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Samara vestita often include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, such as respiratory issues and skin conditions.
